---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a feature for ClawMail
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**Is your feature request related to a problem?**
A clear description of the problem. E.g., "I'm always frustrated when..."

**Describe the solution you'd like**
What you want to happen.

**Which interface would this affect?**
- [ ] MCP (agent interface)
- [ ] CLI
- [ ] REST API
- [ ] GUI (Settings / menu bar)

**Does this fit ClawMail's philosophy?**
ClawMail is agent-first, local-first, and privacy-respecting. Consider whether this feature aligns with those principles.

**Additional context**
Any other context, screenshots, or examples.
